name: review-summary
label: Batch
situation: I want to summarize 100 shop reviews into 3 lines each

slots.output_format: a summary.md table (rows = reviews, columns = excerpt · 3-line summary)

skeleton:
1) Load the list from the reviews CSV (reviews.csv) and count the total N. If N > 100, do not process — stop and report.
2) For each review: summarize one review into 3 lines → accumulate the result.
3) Save as a summary.md table (rows = reviews, columns = excerpt · 3-line summary).
4) [verifier] Count-match input N against output N (flag missing/duplicate), then re-check a random K = min(5, N) in a SEPARATE pass, not right after generation (maker ≠ checker).
5) [hardstop] 3 failures on one item → skip + log; if the cumulative failure rate passes 20%, abort.

registry.verifier: count-match input N vs output N (flag missing/duplicate) + re-check a random K in a separate pass, not by the generator (maker ≠ checker)
registry.hardstop: max_items 100 budget cap · 3 failures per item → skip + log (not a full stop) · abort when cumulative failure rate > 20%
registry.accepted_signal: N rows present in summary.md + a count of the failure log (skip list)
